parsed.production_notes: Character exhibits stiff movements, slightly unnatural lip-sync, and perfect skin. The background has a characteristic smooth, diffused AI look.

characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, fair complexion. Shoulder-length wavy blonde hair. Symmetrical facial features.
characters.wardrobe: Grey turtleneck sweater. Black over-ear headphones.

scenes.setting: Cozy home office. Blurred background with window and bookshelf. Warm, natural lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A sits at a light wooden desk facing the camera. She wears a grey turtleneck and black headphones. A black studio microphone stands in front of her. The blurred background features a bright window with white curtains on the left and a wooden bookshelf with plants on the right. Soft, natural lighting illuminates her face.

scenes.visual_description: Continuous medium close-up of Character A speaking into a microphone. Dynamic text overlays highlight key phrases. The background is a static, blurred home office.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: We're looking for people who are serious about becoming fluent in English this year.
Character A says: Not people who just want to 'try' learning, but people who actually want to speak.
Character A says: Most language apps teach you to tap, swipe, and memorize.
Character A says: They give you streaks, not conversations.
Character A says: Months go by, and you still can't respond in real life.
scenes.on_screen_text:
Serious lerners
We're looking for people who are serious about becoming fluent in English this year
Not people who just want to 'try' learning,
Actually Speak
but people who actually want to speak
Most language apps teach you to tap, swipe, and memorize
Streaks ≠ Speaking
They give you streaks, not conversations
Months go by, and you still can't respond in real life

The blurred background features a bright window with white curtains on the left and a wooden bookshelf with plants on the right. Soft, natural lighting illuminates her face.

scenes.visual_description: The continuous shot of Character A proceeds. Text overlays display a week-by-week progression timeline.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Here is what happens when you practice just 15 minutes a day.
Character A says: In week 1: You lose the fear of making mistakes and start responding naturally.
Character A says: In week 2: Your brain stops translating and starts thinking in English.
Character A says: In week 4: You're having full, confident conversations sounding like a native.
scenes.on_screen_text:
Here is what happens when you practice just 15 minutes a day
